hide-gm-roll-modifiers.settings.sanitize: Hide the roll formula and results for public GM rolls from players, showing only the total.
Hide the roll formula and results for GM damage rolls from players, showing only the total.
Sanitize Dice So Nice! GM Rolls
Do not roll dice for players on public GM rolls.
Remove the crit and fumble colors from rolls.
Merge base and criticial damage on BR5e critical cards, so that crits are opaque.
Sanitize Ready Set Roll 5e Crit Damage
Merge base and criticial damage on RSR5e critical cards, so that crits are opaque.
hide-gm-roll-modifiers.settings.hide-pri: Hide private GM rolls from players entirely.
hide-gm-roll-modifiers.settings.hide-pla: Hide blind/private rolls made by players from other players.
hide-gm-roll-modifiers.settings.hide-ite: Hide description on item cards when posted by the GM, in case those cards contain sensitive information.
hide-gm-roll-modifiers.settings.private-: When performing a roll as a GM for a hidden token, automatically roll privately.
